data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: severity label — informational tenant status.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: severity label — tenant-profile / membership warning.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: severity label — blocking tenant failure.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: severity label — critical tenant incident.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: imperative — save tenant settings.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: imperative — cancel/dismiss.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: imperative — retry after failure.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: empty-state placeholder while loading. Preserve ellipsis (U+2026).
